raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The zero-shot / few-shot contradiction is fatal as written.",
    "R1.4": "Novelty claim is overreached; prior work has predominantly relied on supervised classifiers trained on labeled trace corpora, and even recent LLM-based detectors lack a self-critique/abstention mechanism.",
    "RX.1": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (contradiction between zero-shot and few-shot framing).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (zero-shot vs few-shot retrieval-augmented classification).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (unclear labeling of incident database and its impact on results).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason (missing citations for prior work and recent LLM-based log analysis papers)"
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The zero-shot / few-shot contradiction is fatal as written.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty claim is overreached; prior work has predominantly relied on supervised classifiers trained on labeled trace corpora, and even recent LLM-based detectors lack a self-critique/abstention mechanism.
rationale.RX.1: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (contradiction between zero-shot and few-shot framing).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (zero-shot vs few-shot retrieval-augmented classification).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (unclear labeling of incident database and its impact on results).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason (missing citations for prior work and recent LLM-based log analysis papers)
